data.biography: Renate Reinsve (born 24 November 1987) is a Norwegian actress, best known for Oslo, August 31st (2011), Welcome to Norway (2016), The Worst Person in the World (2021) and Sentimental Value (2025). At the 2021 Cannes Film Festival, Reinsve won the Best Actress Award for The Worst Person in the World, the first time ever a Norwegian actress has won an award at the festival. She has also starred in the Apple TV+ legal thriller series Presumed Innocent, the A24 satirical dark comedy A Different Man, and the thriller Armand (all in 2024).
data.name: Renate Reinsve

data.biography: Renate Hansen Reinsve(født 24. november 1987 i Solbergelva, Drammen) er en norsk skuespiller fra Solbergelva i Drammen kommune. Hun vant Heddaprisen 2014 for beste kvinnelige medspiller for rollen som lærer i «Besøk av gammel dame».
data.name: Renate Reinsve
レナーテ・レインスヴェ

data.biography: Renate Reinsve 于 1987 年 11 月 24 日出生于挪威维肯的索尔贝格尔瓦。她是一位女演员
data.name: 雷娜特·赖因斯夫

data.biography: Renate Reinsve nasceu em 24 de novembro de 1987 em Solbergelva, Viken, Noruega.  Por seu papel em A Pior Pessoa do Mundo, Reinsve ganhou o prêmio de Melhor Atriz no Festival de Cinema de Cannes de 2021, a primeira vez que uma atriz norueguesa ganhou um prêmio no festival, e recebeu uma indicação ao BAFTA e ao EFA pelo mesmo papel. Ela também estrelou Oslo, 31 de Agosto (2011), Um Homem Diferente (2024) e Armand (2024), este último vencedor da Câmera de Ouro no Festival de Cinema de Cannes de 2024 e que lhe rendeu outra indicação ao EFA. Em 2025, ela estrelou Valor Sentimental, sua terceira colaboração com o diretor Joachim Trier.
雷娜特·賴因斯夫 於 1987 年 11 月 24 日出生於挪威維肯的索爾貝格爾瓦。她是一位女演員
data.name: 雷娜特·賴因斯夫

data.biography:
Simon Anthony Abou-Fadel's French/Lebanese father, Edward, and French/Egyptian mother, Françoise, settled in North Hollywood in 1969 As a kid there Simon poignantly remembers the nights he and his older brother would wait up to watch the family's garage door for the first flickering reflections from the screen of the nearby drive-in movie. From those nights, he marks his fascination with movie screens, with the actors who inhabit them, and with the industry that was then only a few streets away.  Simon plays William Douchet in Chuck Russell's Witchboard and Jack Dalton in Jamie Foxx and John Eisendrath's Alert:  Missing Persons Unit. He has landed roles on notable network shows such as Veronica Mars, 24, and Law and Order Los Angeles. Notable roles also include Adrian Holmes' lawyer in the English version of 19-2, Ed Greenstein in the reboot of iconic Canadian television show Street Legal, and working opposite  Mia Kirshner in The Detectives, David James Elliot in Real Detectives and with Trish Helfner in Ascension. Among others, he can be seen in Quantico, The Art of More, The Bold Type, The Republic of Sarah and Transplant with John Hannah and Hamza Haq. Simon Anthony Abou-Fadel is also the narrator for the new IMAX film entitled Train Time.

Simon was a company member at The Actors Gang Theatre in Los Angeles, California, with Artistic Director and film actor Tim Robbins. During his seven years with the Gang, he toured nationally in Embedded, an original play by Robbins, and appeared in a critically acclaimed production of Tartuffe directed by Jon Kellam in which he was reviewed by the Hollywood Reporter that touted his "strong support". Backstage also affectionately praised him and scene partner Lindsley Allen for their scenes, and the Los Angeles Times claimed Allen and he "attained absolute lunacy". While at The Gang, Simon accepted an invitation from the Walt Disney Concert Hall to act in a two-person play with the L.A. Philharmonic Orchestra providing live background music.
data.name: Simon Anthony

data.biography:
Dabney Wharton Coleman (January 3, 1932 – May 16, 2024) was an American actor. Coleman's best known films include 9 to 5 (1980), On Golden Pond (1981), Tootsie (1982), WarGames (1983), Cloak & Dagger (1984), The Muppets Take Manhattan (1984), The Beverly Hillbillies (1993), You've Got Mail (1998), Inspector Gadget (1999), Recess: School's Out (2001), Moonlight Mile (2002), and Rules Don't Apply (2016).

Coleman's television roles included the title characters of Buffalo Bill (1983–1984) and The Slap Maxwell Story (1987–1988), as well as Burton Fallin on The Guardian (2001–2004), the voice of Principal Peter Prickly on Recess (1997–2001), and Louis "The Commodore" Kaestner on Boardwalk Empire (2010–2011). He won one Primetime Emmy Award from six nominations and one Golden Globe Award from three nominations.

Coleman was a character actor with roles in well over 60 films and television programs to his credit. He trained with Sanford Meisner at the Neighborhood Playhouse School of the Theatre in New York City from 1958 to 1960.

Coleman made his Broadway debut in the short-lived A Call on Kuprin in 1961. In a 1964 episode of Kraft Suspense Theatre titled "The Threatening Eye", Coleman played private investigator William Gunther. Two years later, he played Dr. Leon Bessemer with Bonnie Scott as his wife Judy, neighbors and friends of the protagonist in Season 1 of That Girl, episode 3, "Never Change a Diaper on Opening Night". Noted for his moustache which he grew in 1973, he appeared in the sitcom wearing horn-rimmed glasses and with no facial hair. Other early roles in his career included a U.S. Olympic skiing team coach in Downhill Racer (1969), a high-ranking fire chief in The Towering Inferno (1974), and a wealthy Westerner in Bite the Bullet (1975). He portrayed an FBI agent in Attack on Terror: The FBI vs. the Ku Klux Klan (1975).
data.name: Dabney Coleman

data.biography:
Dabney Wharton Coleman war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler. Er wurde für seine Rollen als egomanische und unsympathische Charaktere in komödiantischen Darstellungen bekannt. Im Laufe seiner Karriere trat er in über 175 Filmen und Fernsehsendungen auf und erhielt Auszeichnungen sowohl für komödiantische als auch für dramatische Leistungen.

Zu Colemans bekanntesten Filmen gehören „9 to 5“ (1980), „Am goldenen See“ (1981), „Tootsie“ (1982), „WarGames“ (1983), „Cloak & Dagger“ (1984) und „E-Mail für Dich“ (1998). Zu seinen wichtigsten Fernsehrollen gehörten Merle Jeeter in „Mary Hartman, Mary Hartman“ (1976–1977), die Titelfiguren in „Buffalo Bill“ (1983–1984) und „The Slap Maxwell Story“ (1987–1988) sowie Burton Fallin in „The Guardian“ (2001–2004). Später in seiner Karriere verkörperte er Louis „The Commodore“ Kaestner in „Boardwalk Empire“ (2010–2011). Seine letzte Rolle war ein Auftritt in „Yellowstone“ (2019). Als Synchronsprecher lieh er dem Direktor Peter Prickly in „Recess“ (1997–2001) und in mehreren auf der Serie basierenden Filmen seine Stimme.

Coleman gewann einen Primetime Emmy Award bei sechs Nominierungen und einen Golden Globe Award bei drei Nominierungen.

达布尼·科尔曼（Dabney Coleman）是一位美国演员。他于 1932 年 1 月 3 日出生于德克萨斯州奥斯汀。科尔曼的职业生涯长达数十年，主要从事电影和电视工作。他以多才多艺的表演而闻名，经常以讽刺和冷幽默的方式描绘角色。

科尔曼著名的电影角色包括“朝九晚五”（1980 年）、“Tootsie”（1982 年）、“战争游戏”（1983 年）和“你有邮件”（1998 年）。在这些电影中，他通常扮演令人难忘的配角，例如老板、权威人物或喜剧陪衬。

在电视上，科尔曼出现在各种节目中，他的表演赢得了评论界的赞誉。他出演了情景喜剧“The Slap Maxwell Story”（1987-1988），并因此获得了艾美奖提名。他还在《布法罗比尔》（1983-1984）和《浮桥帝国》（2010-2011）等系列中扮演重要角色。

达布尼·科尔曼 （Dabney Coleman） 的职业生涯跨越了六十多年，他通过众多角色对娱乐业产生了持久的影响。
data.name: 达布尼·科尔曼

data.biography:
De Wikipédia, l'encyclopédie libre.

Dabney Wharton Coleman (3 janvier 1932 - 16 mai 2024) était un acteur américain. Les films les plus connus de Coleman incluent 9 to 5 (1980), La Maison du lac (1981), Tootsie (1982), WarGames (1983), Cloak & Dagger (1984), Les Muppets à Manhattan (1984), The Beverly Hillbillies (1993), Vous avez un message (1998), Inspecteur Gadget (1999), La Récré : L'école est finie (2001), Moonlight Mile (2002) et Rules Don't Apply (2016).

Les rôles de Coleman à la télévision incluent les personnages principaux de Buffalo Bill (1983-1984) et The Slap Maxwell Story (1987-1988), ainsi que Burton Fallin dans The Guardian (2001-2004), la voix du principal Peter Prickly dans Recess (1997-2001) et Louis « The Commodore » Kaestner dans Boardwalk Empire (2010-2011). Il a remporté un Primetime Emmy Award sur six nominations et un Golden Globe Award sur trois nominations.

Coleman était un acteur de caractère ayant joué dans plus de 60 films et programmes de télévision. Il a suivi une formation auprès de Sanford Meisner à la Neighborhood Playhouse School of the Theatre de New York de 1958 à 1960.

Coleman a fait ses débuts à Broadway dans l'éphémère A Call on Kuprin en 1961. Dans un épisode de 1964 du Kraft Suspense Theatre intitulé "The Threatening Eye", Coleman a joué le détective privé William Gunther. Deux ans plus tard, il a joué le Dr Leon Bessemer avec Bonnie Scott dans le rôle de sa femme Judy, voisins et amis du protagoniste dans la saison 1 de That Girl, épisode 3, "Never Change a Diaper on Opening Night". Remarqué pour sa moustache qu'il s'est laissé pousser en 1973, il est apparu dans la sitcom portant des lunettes à monture d'écaille et sans barbe. Parmi les autres premiers rôles de sa carrière, citons celui d'entraîneur de l'équipe olympique américaine de ski dans Downhill Racer (1969), celui de chef des pompiers de haut rang dans The Towering Inferno (1974) et celui d'un riche occidental dans Bite the Bullet (1975). Il a interprété un agent du FBI dans Attack on Terror: The FBI vs. the Ku Klux Klan (1975).

Description ci-dessus tirée de l'article Wikipédia Dabney Coleman, sous licence CC-BY-SA, liste complète des contributeurs sur Wikipédia.

達布尼·科爾曼（Dabney Coleman）是一位美國演員。他於 1932 年 1 月 3 日出生於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。科爾曼的職業生涯長達數十年，主要從事電影和電視工作。他以多才多藝的表演而聞名，經常以諷刺和冷幽默的方式描繪角色。

科爾曼著名的電影角色包括“朝九晚五”（1980 年）、“Tootsie”（1982 年）、“戰爭遊戲”（1983 年）和“你有郵件”（1998 年）。在這些電影中，他通常扮演令人難忘的配角，例如老闆、權威人物或喜劇陪襯。

在電視上，科爾曼出現在各種節目中，他的表演贏得了評論界的讚譽。他出演了情景喜劇“The Slap Maxwell Story”（1987 - 1988），並因此獲得了艾美獎提名。他還在《布法羅比爾》（1983 - 1984）和《浮橋帝國》（2010 - 2011）等系列中扮演重要角色。

達布尼·科爾曼 （Dabney Coleman） 的職業生涯跨越了六十多年，他透過 透過 透過 透過 通過眾多角色對娛樂業產生了持久的影響。
data.name: 達布尼·科爾曼
ダブニー・コールマン

data.overview: Trở về ngôi nhà nơi gia đình anh bị sát hại dã man trong chiến tranh, "người đàn ông không chịu chết" đã tháo dỡ nó, chất lên xe tải và quyết tâm xây dựng lại ở một nơi an toàn để tưởng nhớ gia đình. Khi tên chỉ huy đã giết hại gia đình anh quay lại với ý định hoàn thành công việc, một cuộc rượt đuổi xuyên quốc gia nghẹt thở và không ngừng nghỉ bắt đầu.
data.tagline: Mất đi gia đình, hắn sẽ đáp trả bằng máu.
data.title: Già Gân Báo Thù 2

data.biography: Chan Hung-Lieh (7 June 1943 – 24 November 2009), also known as Chen Hung-Lit and Golden Chan, was a Shaw Brothers  actor famous for portraying villains from the 1960s to 1980s. In his  acting hiatus, Chan was involved in the garment industry. He later  resumed his acting career by joining TVB in 1995, left the following year and did not return again until 2003. He was the brother of Steve Chen Hao.
data.name: Chen Hung-Lieh

data.biography: 陳鴻烈，原名陳鴻烈，香港影視男演員、資深影視甘草演員，出生於上海，曾為 1960 至 1970 年代之國語長片電影的著名反派演員角色，也是當時難得因為飾演反派而一炮之走紅演員，生前亦是邵氏兄弟電影及香港無綫電視藝人。
data.name: 陳鴻烈
นางิสะ ชิบูยะ

data.biography: Maria Fernanda Cândido é uma atriz, apresentadora e ex-modelo brasileira. Faz parte do conselho diretor da Casa do Saber. Sendo filhas dos comerciantes José Reginaldo e Agda Cândido. Aos 4 anos sua família se mudou para Curitiba, onde viveu até os 12 anos, quando se mudaram novamente para São Paulo com a família. Na adolescência estudou no Colégio São Luís, na Avenida Paulista.
data.name: Maria Fernanda Cândido

data.biography: Maria Fernanda Cândido (Londrina, May 21, 1974) is a Brazilian actress, presenter and former model. She began her career as a model before making her acting debut in the play Anchieta, Nossa História. Known for her emblematic characters in cinema and television, she has received numerous awards, including a Press Trophy, a Brazil Quality Award, and the Best Actress award at the Gramado Festival.
data.name: Maria Fernanda Cândido

data.biography: Мapия Фернанда Кандидy всегда давала возможность общественности говорить о своей персоне, поступая неожиданно. Она прекратила успешную карьеру модели в нескольких странах ради получения образования. В студенческие годы отметилась в роли ведущей музыкального проекта на телеканале, но известность обрела после съемок в сериалах. Истории "Земля любви", "Акварель надежды", "Подарок" принесли Марии не только популярность, но и государственные награды. Зрители были готовы смотреть сериал просто при условии участия в нем любимой актрисы. А она в 2005 году пропала с экранов, решив посвятить все время семейной жизни. Только после рождения второго сына артистка решила вернуться в профессию. Постоянная занятость на съемках и семейная жизнь не стали помехой для занятия общественными проектами. Мария курирует социальные центры, помогающие больным детям, и старается быть полезной обществу не только созданием новых персонажей.

data.biography:
Такая Курода (яп. 黒田崇矢, англ. Takaya Kuroda, нар. 17 квітня 1965) — японський актор та актор озвучення з Токіо, Японія. На сьогоднішній день його промоушеном займається компанія Axlone, а раніше він працював з Mausu Promotion та 81 Produce.

Відомий своїм басовитим голосом, завдяки якому його зазвичай запрошують на виконання лиходійських та антагоністичних ролей. Для західної публіки він найбільш відомий своєю роллю Казуми Кірію з франшизи Yakuza.
data.name: Такая Курода

data.biography:
金宁（Bell），1996年12月12日出生于江苏省南京市，中国内地女演员。

2016年9月，主演奇幻爱情喜剧片《雌雄同体》，从此开始演艺事业。2017年3月，主演爱情喜剧片《我的女友是杀手》。2018年8月，主演的古装侦探悬疑剧《唐诗三百案》播出。2019年2月，主演的民国动作爱情片《陈真》开机 。2020年1月，古装悬疑探案剧《少年包拯》中饰演锦儿；4月，主演的古装玄幻片《封神之人鱼传说》在优酷视频上线。2022年，在古装探案电影《狄仁杰之冥神契约》中饰演柳月儿。
data.name: 金宁

data.biography:
金寧（Bell），1996 年 12 月 12 日出生於江蘇省南京市，中國內地女演員。

2016 年 9 月，主演奇幻愛情喜劇片《雌雄同體》，從此開始演藝事業。2017 年 3 月，主演愛情喜劇片《我的女友是殺手》。2018 年 8 月，主演的古裝偵探懸疑劇《唐詩三百案》播出。2019 年 2 月，主演的民國動作愛情片《陳真》開機 。2020 年 1 月，古裝懸疑探案劇《少年包拯》中飾演錦兒；4 月，主演的古裝玄幻片《封神之人魚傳説》在優酷視頻上線。2022 年，在古裝探案電影《狄仁傑之冥神契約》中飾演柳月兒。
data.name: 金寧
